# Fake Data Generator

Fake personal data generator for United Kingdom, Poland, Italy, Russia, Ukraine, and Germany.

## 📞 Contact

Report a bug or contact me on Discord:

Check my website: [nicram-code.github.io](https://nicram-code.github.io/)

![Python](https://camo.githubusercontent.)
![Discord](https://camo.githubusercontent.)

## 📋 Requirements

- Python 3.7 or higher

## 🚀 Installation

1. Clone the repository:
```bash
git clone <repository>
cd fake-it
```

2. Create a virtual environment (optional, but recommended):
```bash
python -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate  # Linux/Mac
# or
venv\Scripts\activate  # Windows
```

3. Install required packages:
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## 🎮 Usage

Run the program:
```bash
python main.py
```

After launching, you will see a menu with options:
- **[1] UK** - generates fake data for United Kingdom
- **[2] PL** - generates fake data for Poland
- **[3] IT** - generates fake data for Italy
- **[4] RU** - generates fake data for Russia
- **[5] UA** - generates fake data for Ukraine
- **[6] DE** - generates fake data for Germany
- **[S] Site** - opens the author's website in browser
- **exit** - closes the program

## 📤 Generowane dane

Program generuje następujące dane:
- Imię i nazwisko / Name
- Email
- Data urodzenia / Date of birth
- Płeć / Sex
- Praca / Job
- Firma / Company
- Adres / Address
- Strona WWW / Website
- Telefon / Phone
- Miasto / City
- Kod pocztowy / Postcode
- Kraj / Country
- Adresy IP (v4 i v6)
- Adres MAC
- User Agent
- Nazwa użytkownika / Username
- Hasło / Password
- URL
- IBAN
- Numer karty kredytowej / Credit card number
- Data ważności karty / Card expiry
- Typ karty / Card type
- PESEL / NIN (National Insurance Number)
- UUID
- Kolor / Color
- Strefa czasowa / Timezone



---

## English Version

# Fake Data Generator

Fake personal data generator for United Kingdom and Poland.

## 📞 Contact

Report a bug or contact me on Discord:

Check out my website: [nicram-code.github.io](https://nicram-code.github.io/)

![Python](https://camo.githubusercontent.)
![Discord](https://camo.githubusercontent.)

## 📋 Requirements

- Python 3.7 or higher

## 🚀 Installation

1. Clone the repository:
```bash
git clone <repository>
cd fake-it
```

2. Create a virtual environment (optional but recommended):
```bash
python -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate  # Linux/Mac
# or
venv\Scripts\activate  # Windows
```

3. Install required packages:
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## 🎮 Usage

Run the program:
```bash
python main.py
```

After launching, you will see a menu with options:
- **[1] UK** - generates fake data for United Kingdom
- **[2] PL** - generates fake data for Poland
- **[S] Site** - opens author's website in browser
- **exit** - closes the program

## 📤 Generated Data

The program generates the following data:
- Name
- Email
- Date of birth
- Sex
- Job
- Company
- Address
- Website
- Phone
- City
- Postcode
- Country
- IP addresses (v4 and v6)
- MAC address
- User Agent
- Username
- Password
- URL
- IBAN
- Credit card number
- Card expiry date
- Card type
- PESEL / NIN (National Insurance Number)
- UUID
- Color
- Timezone
